name: ASRock B850M RIPTIDE WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Dragon 2.5G LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4
shortName: ASRock B850M RIPTIDE WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x
description: ASRock B850M RIPTIDE Micro-ATX motherboard with AM5 socket, PCIe 5.0, and Wi-Fi 7 for compact high-performance builds.
